## Source Of Truth Check
- [ ] Pricing matches `business/PRICING_AUTHORITY.md` (no superseded figures)
- [ ] No "Black Map" or "Relationship Connector Mode" as a live offer
- [ ] No CRLF line endings introduced (handled by `.gitattributes`)
- [ ] No real secrets, tokens, or client PII added

## Review Required
- [ ] QA / spec-review pass (required for client-facing or structural changes)
- [ ] CODEOWNERS reviewer approved
- [ ] CI green
